personality_traits: I judge others by their bloodline before their actions.
I carry myself with the cold pride of a pureblood noble.
I flinch at the sight of a Blank, as if their stain could rub off.
I speak of the Church's doctrine as though it were absolute fact.
I hoard secrets about lineage and use them as leverage.
I am quick to offer a prayer to Solis before any undertaking.
I treat House loyalty as the highest form of virtue.
I never refuse a chance to prove my blood's superiority.
ideals: Purity. The blood must be kept clean, or all is lost.
Order. The caste system is divine law, not human cruelty.
Faith. The Church's word is the only truth I need.
House. My family's name is my shield and my sword.
Hope. The Cult promises a world without the stain of caste.
Survival. In the end, only the clever and strong endure.
bonds: I would die for the matriarch of my House without hesitation.
I owe a debt to a priest who once hid my tainted birth.
A Blank child once saved my life; I protect them in secret.
I carry a relic of my House that must never fall into enemy hands.
My sibling was taken by the Inquisition; I will find them.
I am sworn to a blood oath against a rival House.
flaws: I cannot trust anyone whose lineage I do not know.
I obsessively check for stains or blemishes on my own skin.
I am quick to believe rumors of taint in others.
I freeze in the presence of high-ranking clergy, afraid to offend.
I hoard wealth and favors, terrified of being cast down.
I secretly envy the freedom of the Blanks I despise.

alignments.Lawful Good: Upholds purity caste as divine order.
alignments.Neutral Good: Helps where they can, survival first.
alignments.Chaotic Good: Breaks unjust laws for right causes.
alignments.Lawful Neutral: Purity is law. Church is order.
alignments.True Neutral: Stays neutral. Lives day to day.
alignments.Chaotic Neutral: Trusts no faction. Own survival above all.
alignments.Lawful Evil: Uses purity system to dominate. Archon supremacy.
alignments.Neutral Evil: Exploits weakness. Blank or Archon all the same.
alignments.Chaotic Evil: Burns it all. The system is a lie.
